questions.question: Which of the following best describes system software?
options: A) Software used only to browse the web
B) Software that manages hardware and provides a platform for other software
C) Software designed only for games and entertainment
D) Software stored permanently in ROM to start the computer
questions.answer: B) Software that manages hardware and provides a platform for other software

questions.question: Which of these is NOT an example of application software?

pairs.Application software: Helps the user perform specific tasks
pairs.Firmware: Software stored permanently in ROM or EEPROM that helps start the computer
pairs.Interrupt: Signal that temporarily stops the current task so the processor can handle an event

questions.question: Without software, computer hardware can still perform useful tasks.
Which of the following is NOT a main function of an operating system?
Which interface uses visual elements like windows and icons?
A Command Line Interface (CLI) is best suited for which type of user?
options: A) Beginners who only use pictures and icons
B) Advanced users who need precise control
C) Users who do not need to enter commands
D) People who only use touchscreens
questions.answer: B) Advanced users who need precise control

questions.question: Which feature of an OS allows multiple applications to run at the same time?
The BIOS is an example of:
What is the first program executed when a computer starts?
What is the first thing that the processor does when an interrupt occurs?
options: A) Finishes the current fetch-decode-execute cycle, then checks the interrupt priority queue
B) Deletes the current process from memory immediately
C) Shuts down all connected peripherals
D) Reloads the operating system from storage
questions.answer: A) Finishes the current fetch-decode-execute cycle, then checks the interrupt priority queue

questions.question: Interrupts always have the same priority level, regardless of the source.
An __________ is a signal that temporarily halts the processor's task to execute a specific routine.
Which of the following is NOT listed as a function managed by the OS under system security?
Which of the following would likely have the HIGHEST interrupt priority?
options: D) A request to print a document

questions.question: __________ software carry out maintenance tasks such as virus checking, backups, disk repair, file compression, and security management.
RAM (Random Access Memory) is a type of permanent storage used by the operating system.
Which of the following is an example of a software interrupt?
options: D) Connecting a new USB device
